forbidden_states: Trusted access enabled only through AWS Organizations without the AWS RAM service-linked role
required_states: AWS RAM organization sharing enabled through AWS RAM
Resource type supports the chosen principal type

conditions: AWS RAM sharing with AWS Organizations is enabled through AWS RAM.
The organization has all features enabled.
The AWS RAM service-linked role exists.

source_references.locator: What is AWS Resource Access Manager?
source_references.supported_proposition: Account and OU principals for supported resources

source_references.locator: Enable resource sharing within AWS Organizations > Requirements and Important
source_references.supported_proposition: Prerequisites for organization and OU principals

statement: For a supported resource type, AWS RAM can share a resource with specified accounts or with accounts in a specified AWS Organizations OU when organization sharing has been enabled through AWS RAM.
